animation_cartoon_templates.title: 2D Character Walk Cycle
animation_cartoon_templates.prompt: A cheerful 2D animated character performing a bouncy walk cycle, cartoon style with exaggerated squash and stretch principles, smooth frame interpolation, character has large expressive eyes that blink periodically, arms swinging with secondary animation, hair or clothing elements following with overlapping action, bright colorful design against a simple gradient background, 12 principles of animation applied, anticipation in each step, appeal through rounded shapes and clear silhouette
animation_cartoon_templates.negative_prompt: realistic, 3D render, photographic, static pose, stiff movement, linear motion, no personality
animation_cartoon_templates.lighting: flat cartoon lighting with minimal shadows

animation_cartoon_templates.title: 3D Cartoon World Exploration
animation_cartoon_templates.prompt: Whimsical 3D cartoon village exploration, camera flying through colorful mushroom houses with bouncy rooftops, cartoon trees with exaggerated proportions swaying gently, cute animated creatures peeking from windows and doorways, dynamic camera movement swooping between buildings, toon shader rendering style, saturated colors with rim lighting, particle effects like floating bubbles and sparkles, depth of field for cinematic feel, stylized proportions with oversized elements
animation_cartoon_templates.negative_prompt: realistic textures, photorealistic rendering, dark atmosphere, empty scene, static camera
animation_cartoon_templates.lighting: bright ambient with rim lighting, soft shadows

animation_cartoon_templates.title: Motion Graphics Logo Reveal
animation_cartoon_templates.prompt: Dynamic motion graphics logo animation, geometric shapes morphing and transforming with fluid transitions, bright neon colors pulsing with energy, elements building up from particles that swirl and combine, kinetic typography with letters animating individually, smooth bezier curves guiding motion paths, depth created through layered elements with parallax, glow effects and light streaks, anticipation builds before final logo lock-up, professional broadcast quality finish
animation_cartoon_templates.negative_prompt: static logo, abrupt transitions, dull colors, amateur quality, glitchy movements

animation_cartoon_templates.title: Character Transformation Sequence
animation_cartoon_templates.prompt: Magical character transformation animation, cartoon character starting in normal form then enveloped by swirling magical energy, body morphing with fluid shape changes, costume materializing with sparkle effects, hair flowing upward with dynamic secondary animation, power aura expanding outward, facial expression changing from surprised to confident, anime-inspired transformation with dramatic timing, light beams and particle effects, climactic pose at end with energy burst
animation_cartoon_templates.negative_prompt: instant change, no effects, static transformation, realistic style, muted colors
animation_cartoon_templates.effects: sparkles, energy waves, light beams, aura glow

animation_cartoon_templates.title: Cartoon Action Combat
animation_cartoon_templates.prompt: High-energy cartoon fight sequence with exaggerated physics, character performing spinning kicks with motion blur trails, impact frames with star bursts and action lines, rubber hose animation style flexibility, anticipation poses before each strike, smear frames for fast movements, cartoon dust clouds on impacts, dynamic camera angles cutting between shots, comic book style speed lines, exaggerated facial expressions, bouncy recovery animations
animation_cartoon_templates.negative_prompt: realistic violence, slow motion, stiff movements, dark atmosphere, gore

animation_cartoon_templates.title: Cute Mascot Performance
animation_cartoon_templates.prompt: Adorable mascot character performing energetic dance routine, kawaii style with oversized head and tiny body, bouncy movements with squash and stretch, heart particles floating around, winking and making cute expressions, tail or ears wiggling with secondary animation, pastel rainbow background with stars, character occasionally jumping with joy, chibi proportions, smooth looping animation, sparkling eyes with anime highlights
animation_cartoon_templates.negative_prompt: scary, realistic proportions, static pose, dark colors, aggressive movements

animation_cartoon_templates.title: Animated Logo Build
animation_cartoon_templates.prompt: Playful animated logo construction, cartoon elements assembling piece by piece, each component bouncing into place with personality, letters doing flips before landing, mascot character helping to build the logo, construction tools with faces showing emotions, satisfying snap-into-place moments, confetti explosion on completion, sound-reactive animation potential, professional yet fun approach, scalable vector style graphics
animation_cartoon_templates.negative_prompt: corporate boring style, no personality, instant appearance, static elements

animation_cartoon_templates.title: Children's Storybook Scene
animation_cartoon_templates.prompt: Enchanted storybook animation with pages turning to reveal animated fairy tale scene, watercolor texture style, friendly dragon playing with children in magical forest, trees with smiling faces gently swaying, butterflies leaving trails of sparkles, soft dreamy atmosphere, page turn transitions between scenes, narrator-friendly pacing, educational elements subtly integrated, warm color palette, characters with round friendly shapes
animation_cartoon_templates.negative_prompt: scary elements, sharp edges, dark forest, realistic style, fast pacing

animation_cartoon_templates.title: Comic Book Action Panels
animation_cartoon_templates.prompt: Dynamic comic book style animation with panels sliding and zooming, superhero character bursting through panel borders, action lines and onomatopoeia text effects (POW!, BAM!), Ben Day dots texture overlay, bold black outlines, dramatic camera movements between panels, speed lines for motion, thought bubbles and speech balloons animating in, vintage comic coloring with halftone effects, panel transitions with page flip effects
animation_cartoon_templates.negative_prompt: realistic rendering, no text effects, static panels, muddy colors, no outlines
animation_cartoon_templates.effects: Ben Day dots, speed lines, impact bursts

animation_cartoon_templates.title: Magical Spell Effects
animation_cartoon_templates.prompt: Cartoon wizard casting colorful magic spells, swirling energy forming from wand tip, spell circles with rotating runes appearing, magical projectiles with rainbow trails, sparkle particles following bezier curves, energy building up with anticipation before release, cartoon smoke puffs on impact, objects transforming with morphing effects, glowing auras pulsing rhythmically, whimsical sound-driven visual effects, Disney-style magic animation
animation_cartoon_templates.negative_prompt: dark magic, realistic effects, no colors, static energy, violent spells

animation_principles.follow_through: Parts continue moving after main body stops
animation_principles.slow_in_slow_out: More frames at beginning and end of action

technical_requirements.frame_rates: 24fps for film look, 30fps for smooth, 60fps for ultra-smooth
technical_requirements.color_space: sRGB for web, Rec.709 for broadcast
